provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female shipboard security officer in her 30s with a muscular build and a scar across her chin from a boarding action, wearing a dark charcoal ballistic vest over a steel-blue uniform shirt with the sleeves rolled to mid-forearm, black reinforced shipboard trousers with armored knee inserts, heavy mag-lock boots, a compact energy sidearm in a thigh-mounted retention holster, a ship security comm unit clipped to the vest shoulder strap, a restraint kit pouch on the back of the belt, no rank insignia visible only a security department patch with a hull breach response certification tab
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Tactical vest over blue-grey uniform, patches, thigh holster rig. Clean dark background this time. Reads as ship security, not modern cop. Good.
